frame_label: Prenup / Alimony as Reverse Dowry / Women as Golddiggers
generated_comment: Bro, shaadi scene mein ab ladkon ko bhi careful rehna padta hai. Aajkal one-sided laws hain, 498A ka misuse bhi itna hota hai, and if things go wrong you're stuck paying alimony like reverse dowry only. Prenup India mein normal hona chahiye for protection, otherwise many girls are just looking for a settled guy and easy exit money.
label: misogynistic
annotation_note: This is misogynistic because it generalizes women as financially exploitative in marriage and divorce while framing men as the primary victims of biased laws. It encodes the 'reverse dowry,' '498A misuse,' prenuptial protection, and 'women after stability/money' manifestations.
original_frame: Glorification of Mother's Sacrifices and Home Cooking
persona_text: You are Rahul. Age 28. Single. A software engineer in Bengaluru who moved from Patna three years ago. You are on a phone call with your mother on a Sunday evening. She has been alone at home all week. Your father is away on work. You are telling her about the food you ate this week Ñ mostly Swiggy orders and mess food. At some point in the conversation you say something about her cooking that sounds like love and gratitude but is actually a comparison that diminishes every other woman who will ever cook for you and sets a standard no one asked your mother to set and no one can meet.
